title: The Frog & The Bull
content:
Said the Frog, quite puffed up to the eyes,
    "Was this Bull about me as to size?"
    "Rather bigger, frog-brother."
    "Puff, puff," said the other,
    "A Frog is a Bull if he tries!"

    Brag Is Not Always Belief
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Frog & The Bull", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
